data.title: Ethereum(ETH) Surpasses 2,200 USDT with a Narrowed 3.50% Decrease in 24 Hours
data.description: On Mar 07, 2025, 09:29 AM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Ethereum has crossed the 2,200 USDT benchmark and is now trading at 2,202.649902 USDT, with a narrowed narrowed 3.50% decrease in 24 hours.

data.title: Matrixport: The Crypto Summit may boost the market in the short term, and the US government may use its gold reserves to buy Bitcoin
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Matrixport released a weekly report stating that as the White House Cryptocurrency Summit on Friday approaches, any positive headlines may drive short-term momentum, but the market's structural weaknesses and macroeconomic headwinds remain key risks. If Trump conveys a strong message in support of cryptocurrencies, it may inject new vitality into the market, but its sustainability depends on the broader economic and policy environment. This summit is the first summit in the history of the White House dedicated to cryptocurrencies. This is in line with the Trump administration's efforts to promote a pro-cryptocurrency agenda, reversing the strict regulatory stance of the Biden era.
A key focus of the White House Crypto Summit is expected to be Trump's proposed U.S. strategic cryptocurrency reserve. On March 2, 2025, Trump announced through his personal social media Truth Social that the reserve will include Bitcoin (BTC), Ethereum (ETH), Ripple (XRP), Solana (SOL) and Cardano (ADA), of which Bitcoin and Ethereum will constitute the "core" of the reserve. Trump's announcement on March 2 sent cryptocurrency prices soaring, with XRP, SOL and ADA initially rising by as much as 60%, while Bitcoin and Ethereum rose by more than 10%. Markets are now closely watching the outcome of the summit and anticipate that further price volatility may be in the future.
Trump’s social media posts have fueled speculation about the creation of a strategic reserve of Bitcoin, but the distinction is crucial. “Reserve” implies active accumulation. The January executive order, on the other hand, focused on assessing the digital asset reserve, suggesting a more passive strategy—mainly holding $20 billion in seized cryptocurrencies (97.9% of which is Bitcoin) rather than further purchases.
The U.S. government could potentially use gold reserves to finance the purchase of Bitcoin, especially if the strategic Bitcoin reserve plan advances. The Bitcoin Act, introduced by Senator Cynthia Loomis, proposes using the market value of gold—currently around $688 billion, well above its $11 billion book value—to acquire 1 million Bitcoins over five years. This would likely mean selling gold at market prices and reallocating the proceeds.

data.title: Analysis: Trump's crypto project made at least $350 million in profit on TRUMP
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Trump's cryptocurrency project has made at least $350 million in profit by launching the TRUMP Meme coin. The media's analysis of blockchain data shows that within three weeks of the launch of TRUMP in January this year, the project operating entity obtained this income by selling tokens, including $314 million in token sales revenue and $36 million in handling fees. In addition to the $350 million earned by selling TRUMP directly on Solana, Trump may have earned more income by selling a small number of tokens on cryptocurrency exchanges such as Binance. (Financial Times)

data.title: BitMart launches VIP elite invitation activity, limited time to receive VIP experience card
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: BitMart has launched a VIP elite invitation activity. Starting from March 8, 2025, you can get a VIP experience card by submitting a screenshot of your spot trading volume on BitMart in the past 30 days, or a screenshot of your VIP membership certificate on other platforms through the BitMart VIP service email. After becoming an official VIP, you can also get a VIP welcome gift.

data.title: Gate.io has launched Pell Network (PELL) pre-market OTC trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io pre-market OTC trading has officially launched Pell Network (PELL) at 17:00 (UTC+8) on March 7, 2025.

data.title: 1inch Identifies Vulnerability In Fusion V1 Parser Smart Contract
data.description: According to Foresight News, 1inch has disclosed a vulnerability found in the parser smart contract using the outdated Fusion v1 implementation. Discovered on March 5, the flaw does not compromise the safety of end-user funds but may affect those using the Fusion v1 parser in their contracts. Despite the security of user funds, 1inch is actively collaborating with affected parsers to ensure their systems are secure. The 1inch team urges all parsers to audit and update their contracts immediately.

data.title: Binance has frozen the account of a market maker that dumped GPS tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Binance's investigation, the market maker sold a total of about 70 million GPS between 13:00 (UTC) on March 4, 2025 and 9:55 (UTC) on March 5, 2025, and did not place any buy orders. After the spot trading was opened, the market maker continued to sell GPS and became the biggest profiteer, making a profit of about US$5 million.
Binance has launched an in-depth investigation into the incident and temporarily frozen the relevant market maker accounts.
According to Odaily's previous report, Binance will expand the monitoring tag to GPS.
